meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [3.0.1] - 2024-10-14

### Changed

- constraint inconsistencies fixed (no semantic conflict)

## [3.0.0] - 2024-03-11

### Added

- added `materialDemandIsInactive` as mandatory flag in aspect model header
- added `materialGlobalAssetId` as optional property in aspect model header
- added `unitOfMeasureIsOmitted` as mandatory property in aspect model header
- added `unit:secondUnitOfTime`, `unit:minuteUnitOfTime`, `unit:hourUnitOfTime` and `unit:cycle` to list of unit of measure for load information

### Changed

- migrated from SAMM version `2.0.0` to `2.1.0`
- unitOfMeasure uses value list of shared aspect `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.quantity` now. Units are now represented as reference units instead of common codes
- made `unitOfMeasure` optional
- using external references of `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.business_partner_number`, `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.quantity` and `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.uuid` of version `2.0.0` for respective property definitions
- changed property name of `calendarWeeks` to `pointInTime`

### Removed

- removed 'blank' value in list of `unitOfMeasure`. `unitOfMeasureIsOmitted` flag taking over the function of the 'blank' value

## [2.0.0]

### Changed

- migrated from BAMM to SAMM

## [1.0.1] - 2023-05-10

### Changed

- Changed description for property `changedAt`

## [1.0.0]

- initial version of the aspect model for week based material demands

nodes.label: WeekBasedMaterialDemand
nodes.description: The requirements of a customer towards a specific supplier for a specific material. Each material demand is unique by its Customer, Supplier and Material Number.

nodes.label: materialDemandId
nodes.description: The Material Demand ID uniquely identifies the material demand within the business relationship between a customer and its supplier.

nodes.label: demandSeries
nodes.description: The demands for a dedicated material in a given time period of a given demand rate, distinguished by their demand location and demand category.

nodes.label: customer
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party requesting materials from a supplier.

nodes.label: supplier
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party providing materials to a customer.

nodes.label: unitOfMeasure
nodes.description: Unit of measurement for demand quantities.

nodes.label: materialNumberCustomer
nodes.description: Material identifier as assigned by customer. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in customer's database. Must be unique for each Material Demand in the customer-supplier relationship.

nodes.label: materialNumberSupplier
nodes.description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in supplier's database.

nodes.label: materialDescriptionCustomer
nodes.description: Description of the material.

nodes.label: changedAt
nodes.description: Point in time when the content (any property according to the data model) of the material demand was changed, at the customer, either by a human user or an automated process.

nodes.label: materialGlobalAssetId
nodes.preferredName: UUID of the Part Type Twin
nodes.description: Identifier used uniquely to identify part type twin.

nodes.label: unitOfMeasureIsOmitted
nodes.description: Explicit indicator of whether the unit of measure is left out of the payload intentionally. If "true" it means the sending application sends demand values without unit of measure intentionally and the unit of measure MUST NOT be contained in the payload. If "false" a unit of measure MUST be supplied.

nodes.label: materialDemandIsInactive
nodes.description: Indicates that this material demand is currently not in use/maintained by the supplier.

nodes.label: customerLocation
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site at which the customer needs the specified material for this demand series.

nodes.label: demandCategory
nodes.description: Type of demand for this demand series.

nodes.label: demands
nodes.description: A time series with a specified demand rate along a given time period to describe the demand values for this demand series.

nodes.label: expectedSupplierLocation
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site from where the customer expects the supplier to fulfill the demands of the demand series. The value is used for informational purposes only and is therefore not binding for the supplier.

nodes.label: demandCategoryCode
nodes.description: The code identifying a demand category.

nodes.label: demandCategoryName
nodes.description: The name describing a demand category.

nodes.label: demand
nodes.description: Quantity of materials required in the specified point in time according specified demand rate. This demand should be as close as possible to demand that is derived from the actual production program.

nodes.label: pointInTime
nodes.description: Defines the start of the demand rate as a point in time. The point in time must be interpreted according to the demand rate.

nodes.label: DemandSeriesSet
nodes.description: A set of demand series belonging to a certain material demand. Each demand series in the set must have a unique combination of customer location and demand category.

nodes.label: MaterialNumber
nodes.description: The material number is a multi-character string, usually assigned by an ERP system.

nodes.label: MaterialDescription
nodes.description: Description of a material demand.

nodes.label: Timestamp
nodes.description: Point in time.

nodes.label: PointInTimeCharacteristic
nodes.description:
- If demand rate is "calendar week": An ISO calendar week in which a given demand is needed. Must be given as date of the Monday in the week. (ISO-8601-1:2019)
- If demand rate is "day": An ISO day on which a given demand is needed. Must be given as single day (consider the time zone of the customer's location). (ISO-8601)

nodes.label: Quantity
nodes.description: Quantities of demands.

nodes.label: DemandSeries
nodes.description: Encapsulates the demand series related information.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryType
nodes.description: Describes the type of a demand category.

nodes.label: Demand
nodes.description: A single demand for a given point in time according to the demand rate.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryCharacteristic
nodes.description: The classification of demands used for prioritization or allocation.

nodes.label: DemandDateSeries
nodes.description: The demands in a given time period for a given demand rate.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: The code identifying a demand category.

nodes.label: QuantityTrait
nodes.description: Defining the data type for a demand key figure.

nodes.label: QuantityFixedPoint
nodes.description: Constraint to ensure size of quantities: 18 digits plus 3 decimal places.

nodes.label: QuantityRange
nodes.description: Constraint to ensure a non-negative value for quantities.
